summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that CVS is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $76.02. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 46.2%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $80.37 and a significant trendline confluence around $79.52 (formed by 9 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
